normalization.description:
Normalization model to use. Options are DefaultNorm (use Cellpose default
normalization), NoNorm (disable normalization), or CustomNorm (full control over
normalization parameters).
normalization.title: Normalization

batch_size.description:
Number of 256x256 patches to run simultaneously on the GPU (can make smaller or
bigger depending on GPU memory usage).
batch_size.title: Batch Size

resample.description:
Run dynamics at original image size (will be slower but create more accurate
boundaries).
resample.title: Resample

invert.description: Invert image pixel intensity before running network.
invert.title: Invert

diameter.description: Diameter used to rescale the image to 30 pix cell diameter.
diameter.title: Diameter

flow_threshold.description:
Flow error threshold (all cells with errors below threshold are kept)
(not used for 3D).
flow_threshold.title: Flow Threshold

cellprob_threshold.description:
All pixels with value above threshold kept for masks, decrease to find more and
larger masks.
cellprob_threshold.title: Cellprob Threshold

flow3D_smooth.description: If do_3D and flow3D_smooth>0, smooth flows with gaussian filter of this stddev.
flow3D_smooth.title: Flow3D Smooth

anisotropy.description:
For 3D segmentation, rescaling factor (e.g. set to 2.0 if Z is sampled half as
dense as X or Y).
anisotropy.title: Anisotropy

do_3D.description:
Whether to perform 3D segmentation. If set to False for a 3D image, the image will
be segmented by XY planes independently and then stitched together in 3D using the
stitch_threshold parameter. If set to True for a 2D image, this will be ignored.
do_3D.title: Do 3D

stitch_threshold.description:
If stitch_threshold>0.0 and not do_3D, masks are stitched in 3D to return volume
segmentation.
stitch_threshold.title: Stitch Threshold

min_size.description: All ROIs below this size, in pixels, will be discarded.
min_size.title: Min Size

max_size_fraction.description: Masks larger than max_size_fraction of total image size are removed.
max_size_fraction.title: Max Size Fraction

niter.description:
Number of iterations for dynamics computation. If None, it is set proportional to
the diameter.
niter.title: Niter

augment.description: Tiles image with overlapping tiles and flips overlapped regions to augment.
augment.title: Augment

tile_overlap.description: Fraction of overlap of tiles when computing flows.
tile_overlap.title: Tile Overlap

bsize.description: Block size for tiles, recommended to keep at 224, like in training.
bsize.title: Bsize

verbose.description: Whether cellpose logs should be active.
verbose.title: Verbose

mode.description:
Specifies how to interpret the identifiers. Can be "label", "wavelength_id", or
"index" (must be an integer).
mode.title: Mode

identifiers.description:
Unique identifiers for the channels. This can be channel labels, wavelength IDs, or
indices, depending on the mode.
At least one and at most three identifiers must be provided.
identifiers.title: Identifiers

skip_if_missing.description:
If True and the specified channel(s) are not found in the image,
the segmentation will be skipped instead of raising an error. Defaults to False.
skip_if_missing.title: Skip If Missing

mode.description: Mode to create masking ROI table.
mode.title: Mode

table_name.description:
Name of the masking ROI table to be created. {label_name} is the name of the
label image used for segmentation.
table_name.title: Table Name

table_backend.description:
Backend to use for storing the masking ROI table. Options are "anndata", "json",
"csv", and "parquet".
table_backend.title: Table Backend

mode.description: Use custom normalization with full control over parameters.
mode.title: Mode

norm3D.description:
Whether to normalize in 3D. If True, the entire 3D stack will be normalized
per channel. If False, normalization is applied per Z-slice.
norm3D.title: Norm3D

invert.description: Whether to invert the image. Useful if cells are dark instead of bright.
invert.title: Invert

use_lowhigh.description:
Whether to use lowhigh normalization. If False, percentile normalization will be
used instead.
use_lowhigh.title: Use Lowhigh

lowhigh.description:
The lower and upper bounds for normalization. Incompatible with smoothing and
sharpening.
lowhigh.title: Lowhigh

percentile.description:
The lower and upper percentiles for normalization. Each value should be between
0 and 100. If use_lowhigh is True, this parameter is ignored.
percentile.title: Percentile

sharpen_radius.description: The radius for sharpening the image.
sharpen_radius.title: Sharpen Radius

smooth_radius.description: The radius for smoothing the image.
smooth_radius.title: Smooth Radius

tile_norm_blocksize.description: The block size for tile-based normalization.
tile_norm_blocksize.title: Tile Norm Blocksize

tile_norm_smooth3D.description: The smoothness factor for tile-based normalization in 3D.
tile_norm_smooth3D.title: Tile Norm Smooth3D

axis.description: The channel axis to loop over for normalization.
axis.title: Axis

mode.description:
Use Cellpose default normalization (0-1 rescaling and 1%-99% percentile clipping).
All other parameters are ignored.
mode.title: Mode

type.description: Transformation type identifier for Gaussian blur filtering.
type.title: Type

sigma_xy.description: Standard deviation for Gaussian kernel in XY plane.
sigma_xy.title: Sigma XY

sigma_z.description:
Standard deviation for Gaussian kernel in Z axis.
If not specified, no blurring is applied in Z axis.
sigma_z.title: Sigma Z

HistogramEqualizationConfig.description: Configuration for Contrast Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization (CLAHE).

type.description: Transformation type identifier for histogram equalization.
type.title: Type

kernel_size_xy.description:
Shape of kernel in XY plane. If None, the default is 1/8 of image height by
1/8 of its width.
kernel_size_xy.title: Kernel Size XY

kernel_size_z.description:
Shape of kernel in Z axis. If None, the default is 1/8 of image height by
1/8 of its width.
kernel_size_z.title: Kernel Size Z

clip_limit.description: Clipping limit, normalized between 0 and 1 (higher values give more contrast).
clip_limit.title: Clip Limit

nbins.description: Number of gray bins for histogram ("data range").
nbins.title: Nbins

HistogramEqualizationConfig.title: HistogramEqualizationConfig

masking.description:
If set, the segmentation will be performed only within the confines of
the specified mask. A mask can be specified either by a label image or a
Masking ROI table.
masking.title: Masking Iterator Configuration

roi_table.description:
Name of a ROI table. If set, the segmentation will be applied to each ROI
in the table individually. This option can be combined with masking.
roi_table.title: Iterate Over ROIs

mode.description:
If set to "No Masking", the segmentation will be performed without any masking,
while if set to "Masking", the segmentation will be performed only within the
the confines of the specified mask.
mode.title: Mode

masking_source.description:
Mode of masking to be applied.
    - If "Table Name", the identifier refers to a table name. This must identify
    a valid masking ROI table in the ome-Zarr.
    - If "Label Name", the identifier refers to a label image name in the ome-Zarr.
    In this case, the masking roi table will be built on the fly from the label
    image.
masking_source.title: Masking Source

identifier.description: Name of the masking table or label image depending on the mode.
identifier.title: Identifier

type.description: Transformation type identifier for median filtering.
type.title: Type

size_xy.description: Size in pixels of the median filter in XY plane.
size_xy.title: Size XY

size_z.description:
Size in pixels of the median filter in Z axis.
If not specified, no filtering is applied in Z axis.
size_z.title: Size Z

mode.description:
If set to "No Masking", the segmentation will be performed without any masking,
while if set to "Masking", the segmentation will be performed only within the
the confines of the specified mask.
mode.title: Mode

mode.description: Do not apply any normalization, and ignore all other parameters.
mode.title: Mode

SegmentationTransformConfig.description: Configuration for pre- and post-processing steps.

pre_process.description: List of pre-processing steps to be applied before segmentation.
pre_process.title: Pre Process

post_process.description: List of post-processing steps to be applied after segmentation.
post_process.title: Post Process

SegmentationTransformConfig.title: SegmentationTransformConfig

type.description: Transformation type identifier for size filtering.
type.title: Type

min_size.description:
Minimum size in pixels for objects to keep.
Objects smaller than this size will be removed.
min_size.title: Min Size

SkipCreateMaskingRoiTable.description: Skip Creating Masking ROI Table Configuration.

mode.description: Mode to skip creating masking ROI table.
mode.title: Mode

SkipCreateMaskingRoiTable.title: SkipCreateMaskingRoiTable

channels.title: Channels
channels.description: Channels to use for segmentation. It must contain between 1 and 3 channel identifiers.

label_name.title: Label Name
label_name.description: Name of the resulting label image. Optionally, it can contain a placeholder "{channel_identifier}" which will be replaced by the first channel identifier specified in the channels parameter.

level_path.title: Level Path
level_path.description: If the OME-Zarr has multiple resolution levels, the level to use can be specified here. If not provided, the highest resolution level will be used.

iterator_configuration.title: Iterator Configuration
iterator_configuration.description: Configuration for the segmentation iterator. This can be used to specify masking and/or a ROI table.

custom_model.title: Custom Model
custom_model.description: Path to a custom Cellpose model. If not set, the default "cpsam" model will be used.

pre_post_process.title: Pre Post Process
pre_post_process.description: Configuration for pre- and post-processing transforms applied by the iterator.

create_masking_roi_table.title: Create Masking Roi Table
create_masking_roi_table.description: Configuration to create a masking ROI table after segmentation.

overwrite.title: Overwrite
overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite an existing label image. Defaults to True.
